# Evaluating Skills Snapshot

- Source: <https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/evaluating-skills>
- Retrieved: 2026-04-01

## Key points

- Output quality should be measured with explicit eval cases, assertions, and comparison runs.
- The guidance emphasizes workspace structure, grading artifacts, and iteration loops.
- Human review is still useful for identifying pattern failures after automated grading.

## BitSearch implications

- The repository should keep trigger-eval examples alongside the skill.
- Future BitSearch skill revisions should be tested with both activation evals and output-quality evals, even if v1 ships only trigger-eval cases.
